name: neszen-helper

metadata.name: neszen-helper
metadata.summary: A simple package to convert text to uppercase and lowercase

documentation:
# neszen-package

A simple Python package to convert text to uppercase.

## Installation

You can install the package via pip:

```bash
pip install neszen-package

functions.name: neszen_helper.utils.to_uppercase
documentation:
Converts a string to uppercase.
\:param text: The input string.
\:return: Uppercase version of the string.

functions.name: neszen_helper.utils.to_lowercase
documentation:
Converts a string to lowercase.
\:param text: The input string.
\:return: Lowercase version of the string.
